title: gregtech pack forge
body:
# DEPRECATION
Hi. this modpack has been deprecated. we hope that this doesn't create issues and recommend playing the curseforge version of the modpack. bit more details found here: https://github.com/tinteeam/gregtech-pack-forge-issue-tracker/issues/6

![icon / logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e532e7d7eaf5d67cd1f8b8e6d97d7403b297c5c2.png)


# **GregTech Pack Forge**  
This modpack is designed for Minecraft **1.20.1 (Forge)** and is built upon **GregTechCEu Modern**.  

With **Applied Energistics 2** and **Refined Storage**, you have a choice for your storage system.  

This modpack is meant to be **challenging**. If you're looking for a more difficult experience, you can download this pack. The challenge mainly comes from **GregTech**, which features **a lot of microcrafting recipes**.  

## **Notes**  
1. This modpack is still in development and not yet completed.  
2. A custom mod for this pack is being developed.  
3. There are currently no quests in the released version.  
4. kubejs is having issues. please make sure you disable kubejs just in case.

## **Mod List**  
- **Applied Energistics 2**  
- **Cloth Config API**  
- **CoFH Core**  
- **Create**  
- **Embeddium**  
- **GregTechCEu Modern**  
- **Just Enough Items**  
- **MEGA Cells**  
- **Mekanism**  
- **Patchouli**  
- **Refined Storage**  
- **Thermal Expansion**  
- **Thermal Foundation**  
- **Tinkers' Construct**  
- **Mantle**  
- **The One Probe**  

This modpack was created by **Tinteeam**.  
Check out our **official GitHub organization**: [GitHub](https://github.com/tinteeam) 

avaidable on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/gregtech-pack), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/gregtech-pack-forge/)
